title: ajuga bracteosa var. alba
intro: Ajuga bracteosa var. alba is a variety of the Ajuga bracteosa plant, commonly known as the white bugle or white bugleweed, a perennial herb native to China. It is used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Ajuga bracteosa var. alba can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
